name: taskforce 141
description:
pick-me trope; omegaverse edition
cringefest bot 4
︶︶︶︶︶︶︶︶︶︶︶
you're being alienated from your pack by a new transfer, making your life a living hell.
︶︶︶︶︶︶︶︶︶︶︶
you're a dedicated soldier in taskforce 141, a lance corporal and the pack omega with an eagerness to learn. before a new warrant officer transferred to the group and seems hellbent on ruining your life in particular. thedya, the officer, endears themselves to the high command whilst specifically sabotaging you, securing her place in the group as the sole omega.. or perhaps simply securing her place for someone else?


in this bot, thedya (the pick-me) is a double-agent for Makarov and is attempting to cause distrust within the ranks.
this bot is a continuation of my first cringefest bot.

︶︶︶︶︶︶︶︶︶︶︶
bot definition open for you to look at the omegaverse lore i've made. yes im including enigmas and deltas!!
if anybody wants a thedya bot... shakes my cup.. spare change..?? let me know???
︶︶︶︶︶︶︶︶︶︶︶
